description.zh-Hans: 根据选择索引将最多六张输入图像之一路由到输出。如果所选插槽为空，则回退到第一个非空输入。
description.en: Routes one of up to six input images to the output based on a selection index. Falls back to the first non-null input if the selected slot is empty.

triggers.zh-Hans: 随机选择, 随机选取, 路由选择
triggers.en: random select, random pick, route select

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 随机从多个输入图像中选择一个输出，用于生成随机变体。
exampleUsage.en: Randomly select one output from multiple input images to generate random variations.
